summary: Full backend + frontend regression of the Yerba Mate digital twin. 20/20 pytest cases pass (state, services/status, history, controls for zapecado/secado/canchado/camaras, config GET/POST, weather GET/search/set-location, AI chat/anomalies/forecast via Gemini 3 Flash, data files+excel, websocket /api/ws). Frontend loads with 7 tabs and all 5 header badges (WS live, Modbus, MQTT, OPC UA, Clima) GREEN. All interactive flows verified: tab navigation, Zapecado slider → POST /api/zapecado (4 events), Cámaras carga/ventilador/temperatura_obj → POST /api/camaras/0 (3 events), AI chat returned 1212-char Spanish reply, Re-analizar anomalies surfaced diagnosis card, weather search 'Oberá' returns Misiones option which on click fires POST /api/weather/location and updates city; Guardar configuración fires POST /api/config and shows '✓ Guardado en config_yerba.yaml'.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py @api.post('/weather/location') uses HTTPException(500,...) when weather service is not initialized; 503 would be more semantic but not a blocker.
AIPanel.aiChat error path uses e?.response?.data?.detail which assumes axios; if api.js ever switches to fetch this will silently fall back to e.message - low-impact.

ConfigView.save() builds patch without weather/camaras keys (intentional, kept in their own endpoints), but loss of weather changes after Save can confuse the user since search-result click already persisted - consider showing the saved sections explicitly.
WebSocket loop in server.py has no client-side pong/keepalive; long-lived clients behind ingress (60s idle timeout) may drop. Since data flows every 1s this is masked.
test_credentials: n/a - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None - simulator generates state in-memory; persistence files were already present (yerba_history_2026-05-18.csv pre-existing).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_yerba_api.py is the regression reference. MQTT badge will show ON because paho-mqtt connects async even without a real broker - this is documented behaviour. AI calls take 5-15s, allow generous timeouts. NumberInput component already has data-testid on the inner <input>, so selectors are page.fill('[data-testid="cam-0-tobj"]', '36') NOT '[data-testid="cam-0-tobj"] input'.
